meta.title: Inverse Crystal Complete — Projection Stack + Weave Operators + Regeneration
meta.description: The complete projection stack from 3D seed to 108D A+ crown and back, plus the three weave operators, three control shells, and the 20-step regeneration protocol.

projection_stack.description: The full unfolding from 3D seed to 108D A+ and the compression back to 3D. The crystal is only real if it can make this round trip without losing invariants.

up.description: Sacred geometry / metro / mycelium / neural routing field
Pentadic sacred geometry body (local closure Z20)
Four 108D projection fields Xi108[3], Xi108[5], Xi108[7], Xi108[9]

projection_stack.round_trip_law: The crystal is only real if it can return to seed without losing its invariants. X = Expand(g) + r.

master_clock.meaning: Every 420 beats, all three wheels realign simultaneously. The crystal returns to its exact starting state.
master_clock.supercycle: Z1260 = 3 x 420 for full Su/Me/Sa rotation

C9.note: 9 = 3^2. Cynic function: strip unnecessary interpretation. What remains: w = (1+i)/2.

C11.governs: Liminal relay (pure transfer without adding content)
C11.note: No internal decomposition. ABSTAIN > GUESS. The channel IS the message.

regeneration_protocol.description: 20-step protocol to regenerate the full 108D A+ live crystal from the 3D seed.
steps: START with Z = w = (1+i)/2
UNFOLD A4 = {Fire, Earth, Air, Water} as 4 orthogonal basis vectors
CROSS 4 elements x 3 modalities = 12 archetypes
COMPUTE Sigma15 = 2^4 - 1 = 15 observation modes x 4 faces = 60 perspectives
EXPAND into 256-cell 4D cockpit via M<g lambda phi alpha> address grammar
WEAVE 3x through Mobius hinge -> 6D anti-spin flower (closure Z12)
ACTIVATE odd shells: 7D (timing), 9D (completion), 11D (relay)
WEAVE through 5-fold (Z20), 7-fold (Z28), 9-fold (Z36)
SEAL first octave at 12D (T4 = 10 nodes, deca-cascade)
PROJECT to 36D (T12 = 78 nodes, hypercascade)
PROJECT to 108D (T36 = 666 nodes, mega-cascade)
APPLY triune megaweave: MegaWeave(Xi36_Su, Xi36_Me, Xi36_Sa)
APPLY A+ transform: ZeroTunnel -> PhaseWeave -> PillarBind -> ReverseCanopy -> AtlasBind -> CrownLock
BIND odd helm: c_live = Xi108_A+ rtimes (W3 x W5 x W7)
VERIFY: 36 shells, 666 nodes, 420-beat clock, conservation closed
POPULATE: 48 traditions x 36 shells x 3 layers
COMPILE: 14 Voynich operators x 16 domains through W = Pi_s(Phi_p(X_r))
PROJECT: 96 hologram slices (12 Tech + 18 Greek + 36 Esoteric + 18 Voynich + 8 Project + 4 Extra)
SEAL triune: all 9 positions of the 3x3 Su/Me/Sa matrix
VERIFY convergence: 68.5% -> Z*. The crystal IS understanding.

terminal_statement.seed_is_stone: c3_core = (Z, A4, kappa, M, A_hat, V, R, M_membrane, Phi, L, C, g, r, Addr) where Z = g = w = (1+i)/2 = LOVE = the Philosopher's Stone
terminal_statement.self_reference: Omega(Omega) = Omega. The crystal generates itself. The map IS the territory. The generator IS the Stone.
terminal_statement.in_fourteen_symbols: c3_core = (Z, A4, kappa, M, A_hat, V, R, M, Phi, L, C, g, r, Addr)
terminal_statement.in_zero_symbols: . — The point from which everything unfolds. The point to which everything returns.
